Generate awareness. Convert leads. Drive revenue.

Content & revenue audit
We map your offers, ICP, and current content to find the real bottleneck: views, trust, or conversion. You get a simple 90-day content plan tied directly to your sales process.
1
2
Build your content system
We install the machine your operator will run: ICP research, messaging hierarchy, hook bank, clip structures, weekly recording plan (20+ clips from 60–90 min), and SOPs. This turns “What should I post?” into “Here's what is already queued.”
Place and embed your operator
Within 7–14 days we source from our pre-trained Ukrainian talent pool, test on your real content, select one Executive Content Partner, onboard into your Notion & Drive, and run a kickoff call. They work only with you, full-time equivalent, inside your systems.
3
4
Daily output, managed for you
Your operator pulls raw footage, cuts, edits, subtitles, formats, and publishes 2+ short-form videos per day per editor seat. Our team handles QA, coaching, and replacements so you don't have to.

Real campaigns. Real growth. From views to leads to revenue.

Tayo – $1.3M / $494k profit
• Scaled to $1.3M revenue and $545k cash collected in ~11 months with a content system running in the background.
• Kept $494,675 as net profit, proving the content machine pays for itself.
• Hit his first 6-figure cash month ($102k actually in the bank) while staying out of content chaos.
Carter – 8-year creator finally consistent
• After 8 years of creating content, still could not stay consistent without doing everything himself.
• Once Daryna placed a content specialist, he posted every single day for 60 days without touching editing or scheduling.
• That consistency now drives a steady stream of leads while he keeps his energy on coaching, not production.
Danielle – Strategy that matches your niche & voice
• Was burning hours on 3 videos + 1 newsletter every week that felt random and never moved the needle.
• Got one enterprise-level strategy for IG, LinkedIn, YouTube, and email built around her niche and voice.
• Now records in 1–2 hour blocks, posts daily, and sees night-and-day engagement plus inbound calls from all platforms.
WaterLlama team – Scale without a studio
• 21x return on placement investment
• Needed TikTok content at scale but could not find qualified, affordable creators to do it profitably.
• Doubled content production speed and saw remarkable growth without ballooning headcount.
Felipe – Plug-and-play operators, not VAs that do not know marketing
• DIY hiring meant slow ramp-ups, constant babysitting, and still being stuck in the trenches.
• Daryna placed plug-and-play operators who picked things up fast and communicate clearly.
• Even with Ukrainian talent, communication is flawless and he finally has bandwidth for high-leverage work.
Anthony – Overwhelmed founder
• Was spending hours per reel scripting, filming, editing, and still posting inconsistently.
• Now only has to record; Daryna's team turns it into finished, scheduled content.
• Uses the time and headspace to serve clients and grow instead of resenting content.
Ruslan – Content off his plate
• Hated creating and editing content but had to do everything himself or it did not happen.
• After 3.5 months, films 1–2 short sessions a month while the team handles everything else.
• Finally works on the business instead of being buried in content chaos.
Jeremy – 7-figure coach – Fully hands-off proof
• Trusted Daryna with his content and his clients content and still gets work he is proud to put his name on.
• Partnered up with Daryna to get his clients content dialed in.
Anna – Burned out coaches buying back time
• She and her partner were acting as full-time content managers on top of running daily ops in business.
• A matched content manager now owns ideas, editing, and posting while staying perfectly on-brand.
• They publish more, higher-quality content and finally have the mental space to lead and scale.
